# Top-level apt/dpkg child execution rules required by the live-image
# AppArmor profile. This fixture is intentionally conservative: it records
# stable executables and directories apt/dpkg commonly execute during package
# upgrades, plus maintainer scripts under /var/lib/dpkg/info.
/usr/bin/apt-get Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/dpkg Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/gpg Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/gpgv Cx -> apt,
/bin/dash Cx -> apt,
/bin/sh Cx -> apt,
/usr/lib/apt/methods/* Cx -> apt,
/bin/gunzip Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/lzma Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/xz Cx -> apt,
/usr/bin/zstd Cx -> apt,
/bin/** mixr,
/sbin/** mixr,
/usr/bin/** mixr,
/usr/sbin/** mixr,
/usr/lib/** mixr,
/var/lib/dpkg/info/* ixr,
